data.title: Heritage Mining Confirms Visible Gold, Expanding Potential at Melba Project
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Heritage Mining Ltd. ( (TSE:HML) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Heritage Mining has confirmed visible coarse gold in diamond drill hole ML3900-002 at its Melba Project, at 73.3 metres downhole and outside a previously reported high-grade interval of 42.57 grams per tonne over one metre. The company says this new observation indicates potential to expand the mineralized zone near historic Melba Mine workings, enhancing the project’s exploration upside within a prolific gold-producing district.

The core-hosted visible gold occurs within a sheared, quartz-veined meta-rhyolitic volcaniclastic unit near key lithological contacts, reinforcing the geological model for a mineralized quartz vein array system at Melba. Heritage also emphasized its stringent QA/QC protocols and use of ISO-accredited PhotonAssay analysis at Paragon Geochemical in Timmins, aiming to ensure reliable assay results as it advances drilling and prepares further exploration updates for stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:HML) stock is a Hold with a C$0.04 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Heritage Mining Ltd. stock, see the TSE:HML Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:HML Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:HML is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by very poor financial performance (no revenue, persistent losses, ongoing cash burn) and a sharply weakened balance sheet with equity nearly eliminated and high leverage. Technicals provide some offset due to the stock trading above key moving averages, but the overbought RSI reduces confidence. Valuation offers limited support given the negative P/E and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:HML stock, click here.

More about Heritage Mining Ltd.

Heritage Mining Ltd. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on gold projects in Northeastern Ontario. Its flagship Melba Project, covering roughly 3,886 hectares near Kirkland Lake and Timmins along the Ross Fault in the Abitibi Greenstone Belt, is positioned close to several historic and development-stage gold mines, underscoring its regional exploration potential.

Average Trading Volume: 619,247

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$6.43M

data.title: 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals Regains Nasdaq Listing Compliance Status
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals, Inc. ( (SXTP) ) just unveiled an update.

On January 20, 2026, 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals received notice from Nasdaq that its common stock and warrants were subject to delisting for failing to maintain a minimum bid price of $1.00 per share for 30 consecutive business days, prompting the company to request an appeal and temporarily stay the suspension of trading. On February 11, 2026, Nasdaq informed the company that it had regained compliance with the minimum bid price requirement, leading to the cancellation of a February 19, 2026 hearing and confirming that its common stock will continue to be listed and traded on the Nasdaq Capital Market.

The reversal of the delisting determination removes an immediate threat to 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals’ market listing status and trading liquidity. This resolution stabilizes the company’s position on the Nasdaq Capital Market, which can support investor confidence and access to capital while closing out the compliance matter without further proceedings.

The most recent analyst rating on (SXTP) stock is a Hold with a $4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals, Inc. stock, see the SXTP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SXTP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SXTP is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak fundamentals (outsized losses and ongoing cash burn) and a significant Nasdaq delisting risk. Technical signals are comparatively supportive, but valuation is constrained by continued unprofitability and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on SXTP stock, click here.

More about 60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals, Inc.

60 Degrees Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company whose common stock and warrants trade on the Nasdaq Capital Market. The company operates within the public equity markets framework and is subject to Nasdaq’s listing standards, including minimum bid price requirements for continued listing of its securities.

Average Trading Volume: 3,577,894

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $4.28M

Sino Harbour Holdings Group Limited ( (HK:1663) ) has provided an update.

Sino Harbour Holdings Group Limited announced that its chairman, chief executive officer and substantial shareholder, Wong Lam Ping, has increased his stake in the company through on-market purchases. On 12 February 2026, Wong bought a total of 8,644,000 ordinary shares at an average price of about HK$0.083 per share, with the highest price paid at HK$0.083.

An announcement from Jiaxin International Resources Investment Limited ( (HK:3858) ) is now available.

Jiaxin International Resources Investment Limited has called an extraordinary general meeting in Hong Kong on 9 March 2026 for shareholders to vote on approving a mining services procurement agreement and a supplementary agreement between China Civil Engineering Construction Corporation Ltd. Kazakhstan Branch and Zhetisu Volframy LLP. Approval would authorize the board to execute all necessary actions and documentation to implement the contemplated mining services transactions, with detailed arrangements for proxy voting, share registration deadlines and eligibility set out for shareholders intending to participate in the meeting.

The company has outlined procedures for appointing proxies, treatment of joint holders and closure of the register of members from 4 to 9 March 2026 to determine voting entitlements. These steps formalize shareholder participation in a transaction that could shape Jiaxin International Resources Investment Limited’s operational engagement in mining services, potentially influencing its project execution capabilities and exposure in resource developments linked to Kazakhstan.

Microbot Medical ( (MBOT) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On February 12, 2026, Microbot Medical announced that its LIBERTY Endovascular Robotic System was prominently featured at the International Symposium on Endovascular Therapy in Miami Beach, held February 9–12, 2026. The system, described as the only FDA-cleared, single-use endovascular robot, was highlighted in a town hall on advances in endovascular robotics for its workflow integration and potential to ease operator strain as procedures grow more complex.

Company executives said LIBERTY’s inclusion at ISET underscores growing commercial traction during its limited U.S. market release, which began in late 2025. They reported use across multiple hospitals and specialties, including interventional radiology, oncology, vascular surgery and cardiology, suggesting broad clinical relevance in the peripheral space and setting the stage for a planned full market launch at the Society of Interventional Radiology conference in April 2026.

More about Microbot Medical

Microbot Medical Inc. is a commercial-stage medical device company focused on transforming endovascular procedures through advanced robotic technology. Its flagship product, the LIBERTY Endovascular Robotic System, is the world’s first FDA-cleared, single-use, remotely operated robotic solution for peripheral endovascular interventions, designed for precision, efficiency and safety in vascular navigation.

data.title: Tietoevry Calls 2026 AGM and Proposes Two-Stage Dividend of EUR 0.88 per Share
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

TietoEVRY ( (GB:0KG0) ) has shared an update.

Tietoevry has convened its shareholders to the Annual General Meeting, scheduled for 24 March 2026 at the company’s Espoo headquarters, with participation options including in-person attendance, advance voting and a non-voting webcast. The agenda covers standard AGM items such as approval of the 2025 financial statements, discharge of the board and CEO from liability, adoption of the remuneration report and confirmation of board remuneration levels.

The board proposes a dividend of EUR 0.88 per share for the 2025 financial year, to be paid in two equal instalments of EUR 0.44 per share in April and October 2026, with payments routed via Euroclear structures in Finland, Sweden and Norway. The two-stage payout underlines the company’s continued commitment to shareholder returns and cash-flow management, while stable board fees and committee remuneration signal continuity in governance amid a largely unchanged compensation framework.

More about TietoEVRY

Tietoevry Corporation is a Nordic-headquartered IT services and software company focused on digital transformation, cloud, and data-driven solutions for enterprises and public-sector customers. Operating across Finland, Sweden, Norway and other markets, the group provides consulting, managed services and industry-specific software, positioning itself as a key technology partner in the region.

data.title: Radisson Maps Multi-Vein System to Redefine Scale of O’Brien Gold Project
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Radisson Mining Resources ( (TSE:RDS) ) has shared an announcement.

Radisson Mining Resources is advancing a detailed geological model at its O’Brien Gold Project, highlighting a coherent multi-vein system beneath the historic O’Brien mine. The company reports that at least eight parallel, high-grade quartz-sulphide-gold veins have now been delineated over a 250-metre by 700-metre area, reinforcing continuity with former mine workings and supporting the potential for substantial resource growth.

Under a fully funded 140,000-metre step-out drill program using pilot holes and wedges, Radisson has achieved an 84% success rate in intercepting gold mineralization consistent with existing resources. Management says the work is reshaping how O’Brien should be viewed, shifting its image from a small, ultra-high-grade mine toward a larger-scale Abitibi vein system amenable to modern mechanized mining, with progressive mineral resource updates planned to reflect the growing drill-defined inventory.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:RDS) stock is a Hold with a C$0.79 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Radisson Mining Resources stock, see the TSE:RDS Stock Forecast page.

Radisson Mining Resources Inc. is a Canadian gold exploration company focused on developing its 100%-owned O’Brien Gold Project in the Abitibi region of Québec. The project centers on high-grade quartz-sulphide gold veins associated with the Larder Lake-Cadillac Break, a prolific structural corridor that has historically supported significant underground gold production.

data.title: ATEX Extends High-Grade B2B Zone at Valeriano With Strong Phase VI Drill Results
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

ATEX Resources Inc ( (TSE:ATX) ) has issued an update.

ATEX Resources has reported new high-grade drill results from its Phase VI program at the Valeriano copper-gold project in Chile, extending the high-grade B2B breccia zone by about 100 meters to the north. Hole ATXD32 returned 56 meters at 2.36% copper equivalent within 592 meters at 1.04% copper equivalent, while final results from ATXD26B confirmed long, high-grade intervals that extend the B2B Zone 100 meters down dip and increase grades relative to prior estimates.

The company now has six diamond drill rigs turning and has completed roughly 80% of its 25,000-meter Phase VI program, which is running ahead of schedule despite slower assay turnaround times. Follow-up drilling to both the north and south, including work in an area of roughly 350 by 200 meters that remains largely untested above the porphyry, is aimed at further expanding the B2B Zone, underscoring the zone’s potential to significantly grow the high-grade core of Valeriano for stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:ATX) stock is a Buy with a C$5.25 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ATEX Resources Inc stock, see the TSE:ATX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:ATX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:ATX is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance: no revenue, widening losses, and significantly higher cash burn that elevates funding/dilution risk. Technicals provide the main support due to a strong uptrend, but very overbought momentum signals increase pullback risk. Valuation is difficult to assess given negative earnings and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:ATX stock, click here.

More about ATEX Resources Inc

ATEX Resources Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on advancing the Valeriano copper-gold project in Chile’s Atacama Region. The company targets large-scale porphyry and breccia-hosted copper-gold systems, positioning itself within the Latin American copper-gold exploration space, where high-grade discoveries can materially impact project economics and development options.

data.title: Saga Metals Intersects Broad Oxide Zones in Radar Project Drill Campaign
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Saga Metals Corp. ( (TSE:SAGA) ) has issued an announcement.

Saga Metals has reported strong early results from the 2026 phase of its maiden mineral resource estimate drilling at the Trapper Zone of the Radar Titanium-Vanadium-Iron Project in Labrador. The company has completed seven diamond drill holes totaling 1,244 meters at the Trapper South southeastern oxide anomaly, all of which encountered significant oxide mineralization, including broad semi-massive zones and extensive rhythmic layering that mirror previously reported high-grade zones in Trapper North.

Key intercepts include 111.67 meters of oxide in hole R-0018 and 90.08 meters in R-0017, while twinned holes such as R-0016 and R-0017 are being used to improve structural confidence and refine the geometry of the oxide units. With logging of holes R-0021 and R-0022 in progress and a new hole, R-0023, now testing the southwestern anomaly, the program is systematically expanding along strike and could strengthen Saga’s resource definition efforts and project scale, potentially enhancing the project’s profile in the critical minerals sector.

More about Saga Metals Corp.

Saga Metals Corp. is a North American mineral exploration company focused on discovering and advancing critical minerals, with a primary emphasis on titanium, vanadium and iron. The company’s flagship asset is the 100%-owned Radar Titanium-Vanadium-Iron Project near Cartwright in Labrador, Canada, where it is working to define a maiden mineral resource and expand high-grade oxide zones.

Average Trading Volume: 356,831

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$48.11M

For an in-depth examination of SAGA stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Bloomin’ Brands Adds Planet Fitness CEO to Board
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Bloomin’ Brands ( (BLMN) ).

Bloomin’ Brands, Inc., a major global casual dining restaurant operator behind Outback Steakhouse, Carrabba’s Italian Grill, Bonefish Grill and Fleming’s Prime Steakhouse & Wine Bar, owns, operates and franchises more than 1,450 restaurants across 46 states, Guam and 12 countries. The company focuses on differentiated, consumer-facing concepts that blend scale with strong franchise and operational capabilities in the competitive casual dining sector.

On February 11, 2026, Bloomin’ Brands expanded its Board of Directors from 10 to 11 members and appointed Planet Fitness CEO Colleen Keating as a director and member of the Compensation Committee. The February 12, 2026 announcement underscores the company’s push to deepen its board-level expertise in franchising, hospitality and consumer brands, with Keating’s extensive P&L, franchise and governance background expected to support strategic growth and guest-experience initiatives.

The most recent analyst rating on (BLMN) stock is a Hold with a $6.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bloomin’ Brands stock, see the BLMN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BLMN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BLMN is a Neutral.

Bloomin’ Brands’ overall stock score reflects significant financial challenges, including declining revenue and high leverage. However, the company’s strategic turnaround initiatives and strong cash flow provide a basis for cautious optimism. The high dividend yield and neutral technical indicators offer some support, but the negative P/E ratio and recent financial losses remain concerns.

To see Spark’s full report on BLMN stock, click here.

More about Bloomin’ Brands

Bloomin’ Brands, Inc. is one of the world’s largest casual dining restaurant companies, operating and franchising more than 1,450 locations across 46 U.S. states, Guam and 12 countries. Its portfolio includes Outback Steakhouse, Carrabba’s Italian Grill, Bonefish Grill and Fleming’s Prime Steakhouse & Wine Bar, focusing on differentiated, consumer-oriented restaurant concepts in the midscale dining segment.

The company leverages a mix of company-owned and franchised restaurants to drive geographic reach and brand diversity while maintaining scale advantages in operations and marketing. Its multi-brand strategy positions Bloomin’ Brands to compete across several casual dining niches, targeting value-conscious guests seeking varied steak, Italian, seafood and fine-dining experiences under recognized banners.
